name: Ibew & United Workers
description_short: IBEW and United Workers Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, credit cards, and deposit accounts with competitive rates.
description_long:
IBEW and United Workers Federal Credit Union operates as a full-service financial institution serving members primarily in the Portland, Oregon area. The organization appears to have ties to the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) and united workers, though membership eligibility details are referenced but not fully detailed on their website. The credit union has been active in community engagement, hosting events like home buyer education classes and annual member meetings. The organization maintains physical branch locations and provides both in-person and digital banking services.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products. Auto loans start at rates as low as 3.99% with terms up to 84 months, and they actively promote refinancing from other lenders. Personal loans begin at 9.49%, with VISA credit cards at the same starting rate. They provide home equity loans, mortgage financing, and recreational vehicle loans. On the deposit side, members access checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), vacation savings funds, VISA debit cards, and VISA gift cards. Digital services include online banking, mobile deposits, bill pay, account-to-account transfers, and a mobile app called "It's Me 247."

The credit union distinguishes itself through member-centric promotions and accessibility features. They currently offer promotional incentives such as 1% off published auto loan rates plus 60 days with no payment for transfers (April 2026). The organization provides free financial advisor services and multiple payment options including their LoanPay Xpress portal. They participate in the CO-OP shared branch and ATM network, allowing members access beyond their primary locations. Security features are prominently communicated, including fraud protection and phishing awareness messaging.

The credit union appears well-established with standard operational practices but has notable limitations in online transparency. While the website confirms their existence and service offerings, key details about membership eligibility criteria, specific branch locations, current rates, and fee schedules are referenced but not fully published online. The website content is largely navigation menu items rather than detailed informational pages, suggesting members may need to contact them directly for complete product specifications and terms. Geographic service area appears limited to Portland, Oregon region based on available location references.
services: Auto loans (new, used, and refinance) up to 84 months
Savings accounts and CDs with published rates
Online banking and mobile app (It's Me 247)
CO-OP shared branch and ATM network access
pros: Auto loans with rates as low as 3.99% and terms up to 84 months
Current promotion: 1% off auto loan rates plus 60 days with no payment for balance transfers (April 2026)
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile app (It's Me 247), mobile deposits, bill pay, and online account access
Free financial advisor services available to members
Participation in CO-OP shared branch and ATM network for expanded access beyond primary locations
Multiple loan products including personal loans (9.49%), home equity, mortgages, and recreational vehicle loans
Community engagement with educational events like free home buyer classes
cons: Limited online transparency—critical details like full membership eligibility, branch locations, and complete fee schedules are not published on website
Appears to serve primarily Portland, Oregon area; geographic service limitations not clearly stated online
Membership eligibility criteria are vague; unclear whether open to public or restricted to IBEW members and affiliates
Personal loan and credit card rates (9.49%) are higher than featured auto loan rates, limiting competitiveness for non-auto borrowing
Website lacks detailed product information pages; customers must contact credit union directly for rates, terms, and conditions
best_for: Auto borrowers refinancing existing loans who can qualify for promotional rates and 60-day payment deferral
Members already eligible through IBEW or union affiliation seeking one-stop banking with competitive auto rates
Portland-area residents wanting community-focused banking with in-person branch access and financial advisor support
diagnosis: IBEW and United Workers Federal Credit Union is best for auto refinance borrowers in the Portland area who can access membership and want competitive rates with promotional incentives, plus those seeking full-service banking from a community-focused institution. Main caveat: membership eligibility is unclear from their website, and critical product details like exact rates, terms, and fees require direct contact—limiting transparency for online research.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
